name: Cascade
description: Passive expander for Eddy that exposes its stereo VCA or feedback-filter taps and its clean, compression and distortion bus outs for parallel routing.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 1 L
outputs.description: Left side of Eddy channel 1's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 1 R
outputs.description: Right side of Eddy channel 1's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 2 L
outputs.description: Left side of Eddy channel 2's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 2 R
outputs.description: Right side of Eddy channel 2's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 3 L
outputs.description: Left side of Eddy channel 3's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: VCA/Filter 3 R
outputs.description: Right side of Eddy channel 3's expander tap. Switches between the VCA output and the feedback-filter output.

outputs.name: Clean L
outputs.description: Left channel of the clean bus output.

outputs.name: Clean R
outputs.description: Right channel of the clean bus output.

outputs.name: Dist L
outputs.description: Left channel of the distortion bus output.

outputs.name: Dist R
outputs.description: Right channel of the distortion bus output.

outputs.name: Comp L
outputs.description: Left channel of the compression bus output.

outputs.name: Comp R
outputs.description: Right channel of the compression bus output.

behaviors.name: Triple stereo VCA access
behaviors.description: The upper three stereo pairs expose the per-channel VCA outputs so Eddy can be broken out as three independent stereo VCAs.

behaviors.name: Feedback filter taps
behaviors.trigger: EQ/CH switch set to filter mode
behaviors.description: The same upper three pairs can instead expose the feedback filter taps, letting the Eddy signal path be split for parallel processing.

behaviors.name: Bus output splitting
behaviors.description: The lower three stereo pairs provide simultaneous clean, distortion and compression bus outs so the same performance can be sent to multiple destinations.

behaviors.name: Passive expansion
behaviors.description: Cascade is passive and does not increase current draw. It only reveals paths already present inside Eddy.

patchIdeas.name: Parallel stem split
patchIdeas.patch: Use the clean bus for the main mix, the distortion bus for grit, and the compression bus for side processing while the upper pairs feed individual effect chains.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Cascade:
Filter:
Delay:
Compressor:
Mixer:
Output:

- Cascade (Clean L) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Cascade (Dist L) -> Distortion (In)
- Cascade (Comp L) -> Compressor (In)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 1 L) -> Filter (In)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 2 L) -> Delay (In)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 3 L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Triple stereo VCA lane
patchIdeas.patch: Treat the upper three stereo pairs as three separate VCAs and fan them into a three-way stereo processing chain.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Cascade:
Filter:
Reverb:
Delay:
Output:

- Cascade (VCA/Filter 1 L) -> Filter (In L)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 1 R) -> Filter (In R)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 2 L) -> Reverb (In L)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 2 R) -> Reverb (In R)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 3 L) -> Delay (In L)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 3 R) -> Delay (In R)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Feedback filter parallelism
patchIdeas.patch: Flip the upper section to feedback-filter mode and send the three taps to different processors while the bus outputs keep the mix intact.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Cascade:
Filter:
Phaser:
Output:

- Cascade (VCA/Filter 1 L) -> Filter (In)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 2 L) -> Phaser (In)
- Cascade (VCA/Filter 3 L) -> Output (In L)
- Cascade (Clean R) -> Output (In R)
